'''Chedak Communications''' was a communications corporation specializing in shipboard [[Subspace/Legends|subspace]] [[Subspace transceiver/Legends|radio]]s, [[Comlink/Legends|comlinks]] and [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojectors]]. They also owned several broadcast networks and entertainment studios.<ref name="EGWT" /> Chedak made a great deal of credits selling to the entertainment industry, but when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] came down on the media, Chedak started losing profit. Nevertheless, Chedak continued onward, and during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], they had branched out into news reporting, covering the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] on the front lines of battlefields.

{{Company-stub}}
